format.description: A renderer hint mirroring the data schema's `format` (e.g. `currency`), driving tester priority.

readOnly.description: Render the control read-only regardless of PDP state (a design-time affordance, doc 07 §11.2).

multi.description: Multi-line text affordance for long string fields.

description:
Renderer options on a `Control` — the small, typed subset the baseline generator emits and the
renderer registry (doc 07 §4) understands. Kept closed (no free-form map) so the emitted contract
stays a stable boundary the harness can validate.
